title: A computational fluid dynamics (CFD) modeling in a new design of closed greenhouse
subtitle: Modelagem de dinâmica de fluidos computacional (CFD) em um novo projeto de estufa fechada
description: A report on applying computational fluid dynamics (CFD) to simulate and optimize the thermal, airflow, and humidity performance of a novel closed greenhouse design. It evaluates temperature distribution, airflow patterns, and mass transfer to improve energy efficiency and crop growing conditions.
